name: File Tree
description: Scan a drive or folder and see exactly what's using your space — every directory and file rolled up and sorted largest-first, with size bars. Like WizTree, inside luma.
details:
Point File Tree at a drive or folder and it walks the whole thing, rolling every file up into its parent directory so you can see at a glance what's actually eating your storage.

Results are sorted largest-first with a size bar next to each entry, so the biggest offenders are always at the top — drill into any folder to keep narrowing it down.
